description:
This intermediate to advanced PostgreSQL quiz tests SQL mastery through a mix of common and obscure features, including built-in aggregates, type casting, and constraints. The friendly, engaging tone encourages learning by highlighting 'gotchas' and offering a challenge with part 2 as a follow-up.
Topics: Built-in aggregates, Type casting, Constraints, PostgreSQL features, SQL syntax nuances
Audience: Developers and database administrators with existing PostgreSQL knowledge seeking to deepen their expertise
